cards.title: Glyph Grid Studio ▦
cards.desc: Generative glyph-grid art studio — ASCII portraits, flow fields, character-density shading. Live parameter exploration with seeded randomness for reproducible pieces. Now live — free, open source, universal macOS.

cards.title: Love Kana 🌸
cards.desc: Learn every Japanese kana — free, forever. Hiragana and katakana taught the way the loved-but-pricey apps do: vivid mnemonics, real SM-2 spaced repetition, recognition → recall → stroke-order writing, and streaks. Every kana and every feature free — no paywall, no ads, no accounts. Built for neurodivergent learners: OpenDyslexic throughout, full VoiceOver and Dynamic Type.

cards.title: Sparky ✨
cards.desc: A local knowledge brain for you and your AI agents. Sparky captures what matters into a private, typed knowledge graph with hybrid retrieval, then serves it back as memory — to your agents or to you. Focus timer, habits, study, notes, and a medication logger built in. No accounts, bring your own AI.

cards.title: Tongue 🗣️
cards.desc: Dedicated language-learning app. Japanese and Mandarin now, Korean coming next. HVPT-aligned voice mode and a cross-language Sino bridge built in — and I'm learning the languages on it as I build it.

cards.title: LoveSparkCards 🃏
cards.desc: Flashcards with SM2 spaced repetition. Built for language learners, students, and anyone who wants what they study to actually stick. TTS for language cards.

cards.title: Sparky Reads 📖
cards.desc: A modern, intuitive, aesthetic alternative to Goodreads. Track what you read, rate, review, shelve — with optional AI for recommendations, summaries, and reading-mood matching when you want them.

cards.title: Sparky Reads · Web 🌐
cards.desc: Sparky Reads in the browser — same modern Goodreads alternative, same optional AI recommendations & summaries, no install required.

cards.title: Axion Physics 🔭
cards.desc: Frank Herbert's Dune is my favourite sci-fi series — so I built a physics course inside it. First principles mechanics, waves, and thermodynamics, with exercises that make the concepts stick.

cards.title: Axion Algebra ✶
cards.desc: A Herbert fan's take on math education: algebra through the maths behind ML, taught inside a Dune story. Real curriculum, real exercises — the kind that make things click, not just scroll past.

cards.title: Cozy Sleep 🌙
desc: Not another sleep tracker — Apple Health and Oura already do that. Cozy Sleep is a reasoning layer on top: it pulls in your sleep data plus meds, caffeine, training, and stress, and stitches one honest plain-English read on why you slept the way you did.
Testing this out as a personal recovery-intelligence experiment. Likely lands inside Sparky / the LoveSpark ecosystem rather than shipping as a standalone app.

cards.title: Pomodoro Focus Timer ⏲️
cards.desc: Cute Pomodoro timer with site blocking, task management, and session stats — designed for ADHD brains 💕

cards.title: Anti Brainrot 🧠
cards.desc: Block infinite scroll traps, autoplay rabbit holes, and algorithmic attention hooks designed to keep you stuck.

cards.title: Focus Blossom 🌸
cards.desc: Every blocked site grows a flower garden. The longer you resist, the more it blooms 🌸

cards.title: LoveSpark Sponsor Skip ⏭️
cards.desc: Auto-skip sponsored segments, self-promos, and filler in YouTube videos. Powered by the SponsorBlock community.

cards.title: LoveSpark Notes 📝
cards.desc: A beautiful, private notes app in every new tab. Categories, search, and themes — no account, every note stored locally.

cards.title: LoveSpark Dashboard 📊
cards.desc: A place to view all LoveSpark extensions by category.

cards.title: Neurodivergent Reader 📖
cards.desc: Improve reading focus with dyslexia fonts, reading rulers, paragraph focus & distraction removal. Built for ADHD & dyslexia.

cards.title: Cozy: A11y Toolkit 🛋️
cards.desc: Free accessibility toolkit — dyslexia fonts, reading ruler, bionic reading, sensory controls, TTS & more. No data collected.

cards.title: LoveSpark AdBlock 🛡️
cards.desc: Block ads, trackers, and junk across the web. Fast, lightweight, and privacy-first — no filter list subscriptions required.

cards.title: I Don't Want Cookies 🍪
cards.desc: Auto-dismiss cookie banners. Decline tracking, accept necessary — without the click-through ritual every single time.

cards.title: Reddit Ad Blocker 🧹
cards.desc: Strip promoted posts, banner ads, and sponsored junk from Reddit. Clean feed, no distractions, no clutter.

cards.title: LoveSpark Link Cleaner ✂️
cards.desc: Strips tracking parameters from URLs automatically. Clean links, no data collection, no tracking.

cards.title: Popup Blocker 🚫
cards.desc: Block popup windows, tab hijacks, and YouTube ads across 4 layers — CSS, JS, network rules, and video player.

cards.title: LoveSpark Retro Pink 🎀
cards.desc: Dress your browser in deep mauve and hot pink. Every tab, toolbar, and new page — reclaimed and beautified.

cards.title: LoveSpark Retro Cursor Pack 🖱️
cards.desc: Replace your boring system cursor with a custom pink sparkle pointer. Small thing. Big mood.

cards.title: Valentine Light 💌
cards.desc: A soft, creamy pink syntax theme for VS Code. Code like you're writing love letters. Warm, readable, easy on the eyes.

cards.title: Aaron ◆ Public Knowledge
cards.desc: Find free, legal sources for academic papers and research. Open access to public knowledge — as it should be. "I will work on a stronger version at some point."
